summary: E2E testing of Bakery Management System (React + FastAPI + MongoDB). 15/15 pytest backend tests pass. Frontend critical flows verified: landing, login button, protected-route redirect, authenticated dashboard, product create/list, cart auto-increment and auto-total, place-order clears cart, and order history renders placed orders.

issues: React hydration warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' in the product-select dropdown. Triggered by the dev-tool/editor injecting a span with style=display:contents inside each <option>. Functionality is unaffected (select still works) but it floods console with warnings. Low priority — likely Emergent preview tooling, not user code. Consider rendering plain text or filing upstream.

action_items: None blocking. Optionally investigate hydration warning in Orders.jsx <select><option> caused by dev-tool span injection.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py correctly excludes mongo _id in all find queries and responses; verified in tests.
Bearer-header auth path works alongside cookie auth — good for SSR-less testability.
POST /api/orders validates empty items (400) and computes total server-side from subtotals — good.
Session cookie uses samesite=none; secure=true; httponly=true — correct for cross-site preview domain.
Protected FE routes correctly redirect to /login when unauth.
test_credentials: Generated via mongosh per /app/auth_testing.md. session_token=test_session_1776603421322, user_id=test-user-1776603421322 (valid 7 days).
seed_data_creation: Test user + session inserted in test_database (users, user_sessions). TEST_ prefixed products/orders cleaned up post-test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — uses env TEST_SESSION_TOKEN/TEST_USER_ID (defaults baked in). Pytest JUnit at /app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. If session expires (7 days), regenerate via /app/auth_testing.md snippet and re-export env vars.
